manifest.name: jira_governed_fronting_showcase Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# jira_governed_fronting_showcase

ANIP package `jira-fronting-showcase@0.2.0` for local showcase and registry smoke usage.

## Contents

- Services: 1
- Capabilities: 11
- ANIP spec: `anip/0.24`

## Capability Surface

- `jira.backlog.search_context`
- `jira.issue.get_context`
- `jira.incident_bug.prepare`
- `jira.story.prepare`
- `jira.subtask.prepare`
- `jira.customer_escalation.comment.prepare`
- `jira.workflow_transition.request`
- `jira.sprint_move.request`
- `jira.assignee_change.request`
- `jira.issue_link.request`
- `jira.release_notes.prepare`

## Generate

From a downloaded package bundle:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json --target python --dependency-source local --output ./generated/jira-fronting-showcase --force
```

From a trusted registry package:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id jira-fronting-showcase --package-version 0.2.0 --target python --dependency-source registry --output ./generated/jira-fronting-showcase --force
```

## Verify

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --definition anip-service-definition.json
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json
```

## Run Locally

Generated services default to port `9140` unless overridden by the generated runtime configuration.

intent.summary: Request reassignment of a Jira issue with backend user resolution, preview, approval, and audit.

# jira_governed_fronting_showcase

ANIP package `jira-fronting-showcase@0.2.0` for local showcase and registry smoke usage.

## Contents

- Services: 1
- Capabilities: 11
- ANIP spec: `anip/0.24`

## Capability Surface

- `jira.backlog.search_context`
- `jira.issue.get_context`
- `jira.incident_bug.prepare`
- `jira.story.prepare`
- `jira.subtask.prepare`
- `jira.customer_escalation.comment.prepare`
- `jira.workflow_transition.request`
- `jira.sprint_move.request`
- `jira.assignee_change.request`
- `jira.issue_link.request`
- `jira.release_notes.prepare`

## Generate

From a downloaded package bundle:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json --target python --dependency-source local --output ./generated/jira-fronting-showcase --force
```

From a trusted registry package:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id jira-fronting-showcase --package-version 0.2.0 --target python --dependency-source registry --output ./generated/jira-fronting-showcase --force
```

## Verify

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --definition anip-service-definition.json
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json
```

## Run Locally

Generated services default to port `9140` unless overridden by the generated runtime configuration.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which Jira project should be searched.
Ask what work context the user wants to find.
inputs.summary: Bounded work-search intent. The service owns safe JQL construction.
Optional workflow status filter resolved by the backend.

inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.
inputs.summary: Bounded Jira provider options such as selected fields, pagination, or safe expand clauses. Must not allow arbitrary JQL or raw export.

capability_formalizations.summary: Find bounded work context in an allowed Jira project without exposing raw JQL or unbounded issue export.
capability_formalizations.title: Search Backlog Context

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which Jira issue should be inspected.

inputs.summary: Whether bounded comments should be included.
Whether bounded changelog history should be included.
Bounded provider-specific include controls. Must not expose private projects or raw exports.

capability_formalizations.summary: Inspect one Jira issue with bounded actor-visible fields, comments, and history.
capability_formalizations.title: Get Issue Context

inputs.summary: Incident or defect context to place in the issue description.
Components to propose, resolved by the backend.
Bounded provider-specific create metadata controls. Must not inject raw fields or bypass approval.

capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a Jira bug ticket from incident or defect context without creating it.
capability_formalizations.title: Prepare Incident Bug

inputs.summary: Bounded provider-specific create metadata controls. Must not inject raw fields or bypass approval.

capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a Jira story preview with acceptance criteria before any issue is created.
capability_formalizations.title: Prepare Story

inputs.summary: Optional assignee reference resolved by the backend.
Bounded provider-specific create controls. Must not bypass approval.

capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a subtask under an existing parent issue without creating it.
capability_formalizations.title: Prepare Subtask

inputs.summary: Context to summarize in the comment.
Bounded comment rendering options. Must not post directly or bypass approval.

capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a customer-safe Jira comment from incident or triage context without posting it.
capability_formalizations.title: Prepare Customer Escalation Comment

inputs.summary: Bounded transition metadata controls. Must not bypass workflow policy.

capability_formalizations.summary: Request a governed Jira issue transition and stop for approval when policy requires it.
capability_formalizations.title: Request Workflow Transition

inputs.summary: Target sprint, backlog, or sprint identifier.
Business reason for the sprint move.
Bounded sprint/board controls. Must not expose hidden boards or bypass approval.

capability_formalizations.summary: Request moving Jira issue(s) into a sprint or backlog with approval and actor-visible board scope.
capability_formalizations.title: Request Sprint Move

inputs.summary: Assignee reference resolved by the backend.
Bounded assignee lookup controls. Must not expose user directories outside allowed scope.

capability_formalizations.summary: Request reassignment of a Jira issue with backend user resolution, preview, approval, and audit.
capability_formalizations.title: Request Assignee Change

inputs.summary: Bounded issue-link controls. Must not bypass cross-project policy.

capability_formalizations.summary: Request linking two Jira issues with a declared relationship and cross-project policy checks.
capability_formalizations.title: Request Issue Link

inputs.summary: Release or fix version reference resolved by the backend.
Bounded issue-selection intent. The service owns safe JQL construction.
Bounded release-note controls. Must not allow raw issue export.

capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare release notes from bounded Jira issues without publishing or mutating Jira.
capability_formalizations.title: Prepare Release Notes
